City guide · Fan-shaped city · Tech hub

Karlsruhe
interactive.

Palace, ZKM, KIT, the Federal Constitutional Court and the Turmberg. The city guide for Karlsruhe — attractions, hotels, districts and tech news.

Attractions

Districts

Highlights

Attractions in Karlsruhe

See all →
Landmark
Free

City Centre West

Karlsruhe Palace

Baroque residential palace of the Margraves of Baden. The geometric heart of the fan-shaped city and Karlsruhe's defining landmark.

Free entry
Park
Free

City Centre West

Palace Gardens

English landscape park behind the palace with a botanical garden and tree stands more than a hundred years old.

Free entry
Museum

Suedweststadt

ZKM Center for Art and Media

A globally unique museum of media art in a former munitions factory. Interactive installations, virtual worlds and digital art.

from 9 EUR
Museum

City Centre West

State Art Gallery Karlsruhe

One of the oldest and most important picture galleries in Germany. Cranach, Grünewald, Rembrandt and Caspar David Friedrich.

from 8 EUR
Market Square
Free

City Centre West

Market Square with the Pyramid

A reddish sandstone pyramid serving as the tomb of city founder Karl Wilhelm. The neoclassical heart of the city.

Free entry
Church
Free

City Centre West

St Stephen's Church

A neoclassical rotunda by Friedrich Weinbrenner, modelled on the Pantheon in Rome.

Free entry

Touren & Tickets · GetYourGuide

Touren & Erlebnisse in Karlsruhe

Entdecke Karlsruhe mit geführten Touren, Hop-on-Hop-off-Bus, Schlossbesuchen und vielem mehr.

* Affiliate — Buchung laeuft ueber GetYourGuide. Bei Buchung ueber diese Links erhalten wir eine Provision, fuer dich entstehen keine Mehrkosten.

Along the fan

Karlsruhe districts

All districts →
BaroqueFan layout

City Centre West

Schlossplatz, market square and the western pedestrian zone. Karlsruhe's baroque heart and the origin of the fan layout.

8 Sights 10 Hotels 13 Restaurants
UrbanTheatre

City Centre East

East of Karl-Friedrich-Strasse: Friedrichsplatz, the state theatre and a lively urban downtown atmosphere.

4 Sights 0 Hotels 7 Restaurants
MulticulturalAlternative

Suedstadt

A multicultural, alternative neighbourhood around Werderplatz and Werderstrasse.

3 Sights 0 Hotels 6 Restaurants
GründerzeitResidential

Suedweststadt

A Gründerzeit residential quarter with period buildings, the city park and the zoo close by.

1 Sights 2 Hotels 1 Restaurants
CollegesResidential

Weststadt

Mühlburger Tor, Yorkstrasse, colleges and residential living. Early classicism meets student life.

0 Sights 0 Hotels 0 Restaurants
Village coreLake

Mühlburg

A former village in the west, today a city district with the Entenfang lake and an old village core.

0 Sights 1 Hotels 0 Restaurants

Tech · Science · Culture

Karlsruhe news

All news →
Tech
Tech
May 22·Source: KIT Pressemitteilung

KIT reports progress towards scalable quantum computers

Researchers at the Karlsruhe Institute of Technology have, for the first time, demonstrated an ion-based quantum chip with more than 100 error-corrected qubits.

Culture
Culture
May 20·Source: BNN Badische Neueste Nachrichten

ZKM opens immersive AI exhibition 'Generative Worlds'

The new temporary exhibition at the ZKM presents 30 international positions on generative AI in art and science.

Tech
Tech
May 18·Source: CyberForum

CyberForum reports record number of Karlsruhe startup arrivals

With 87 new member companies, the CyberForum is having the most active year in its history in 2026.

Karlsruhe interactive. Fan-shaped city, KIT, ZKM and the Federal Constitutional Court. Attractions, hotels, districts and tech news on one portal.
